metadata.name: hellonjue
metadata.summary: My first Python library for ASCII art generation

classes.name: tests.test_functions.TestASCIIArt

methods.name: tests.test_functions.TestASCIIArt.setUp
documentation: Sets up an instance of the ASCIIArt class for testing.

methods.name: tests.test_functions.TestASCIIArt.test_generate_pyramid
documentation: Tests the generate_pyramid method with a specific height.

methods.name: tests.test_functions.TestASCIIArt.test_generate_diamond
documentation: Tests the generate_diamond method with a specific size.

methods.name: tests.test_functions.TestASCIIArt.test_display_pattern

Unit tests for the ASCIIArt library.

modules.name: hellonjue.functions
documentation:
ascii_art_library.py

A simple Python library for generating and displaying ASCII art patterns.

classes.name: hellonjue.functions.ASCIIArt

methods.name: hellonjue.functions.ASCIIArt.generate_pyramid
documentation:
Generates a pyramid pattern.

Args:
    height (int): The height of the pyramid.

Returns:
    str: The pyramid pattern as a string.

methods.name: hellonjue.functions.ASCIIArt.generate_diamond
documentation:
Generates a diamond pattern.

Args:
    size (int): The size of the diamond (half the height).

Returns:
    str: The diamond pattern as a string.

methods.name: hellonjue.functions.ASCIIArt.generate_spiral
documentation:
Generates a simple ASCII spiral pattern.

Args:
    size (int): The size of the spiral (side length).

Returns:
    str: The spiral pattern as a string.

methods.name: hellonjue.functions.ASCIIArt.display_pattern
documentation:
Displays the given ASCII art pattern.

Args:
    pattern (str): The ASCII art pattern to display.
A class to generate and display various ASCII art patterns.
